RAG System Test Document - TXT Format

This is a plain text file testing our RAG system TXT parser capability.

Section 1: Introduction
The RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) system processes various file formats.
It supports PDF, DOCX, XLSX, CSV, TXT, HTML, and Markdown files.

Section 2: Features
- Multilingual support with BGE-M3 embeddings
- Vector search using pgvector
- Fast LLM responses with Llama 3.2 1B model
- Production-grade error handling

Section 3: Performance
The system delivers answers in 10-30 seconds on CPU.
With GPU, response time drops to 1-3 seconds.
